title: BEM-901 pilot readiness
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/pilot').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

pilot_scaffold = {
  'bem':'BEM-901',
  'status':'PILOT_SCAFFOLD_READY',
  'purpose':'prepare business pilot execution layer before operator chooses real segment/client/objective',
  'operator_gate_required_for':['real_client','real_business_segment','pilot_success_metric','commercial_priority'],
  'can_prepare_without_operator':['pilot folders','candidate templates','technical prerequisites','measurement schema','go/no-go checklist'],
  'folders':{
    'intake':'governance/pilot/intake',
    'canvas':'governance/pilot/canvas',
    'evaluation':'governance/pilot/evaluation',
    'evidence':'governance/pilot/evidence'
  }
}
for p in pilot_scaffold['folders'].values():
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/state/pilot_readiness.json').write_text(json.dumps(pilot_scaffold, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

checklist = [
  {'id':'PILOT-READY-001','name':'repository baseline ready','required_proof':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_READY.md'},
  {'id':'PILOT-READY-002','name':'autonomous sending contour ready','required_proof':'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md'},
  {'id':'PILOT-READY-003','name':'business model canvas template exists','required_proof':'BEM-902 pending'},
  {'id':'PILOT-READY-004','name':'product onboarding kit exists','required_proof':'BEM-903 pending'},
  {'id':'PILOT-READY-005','name':'evaluation dashboard exists','required_proof':'BEM-904 pending'},
  {'id':'PILOT-GATE-001','name':'operator selects real pilot target','required_proof':'operator decision required'}
]
Path('governance/pilot/PILOT_READINESS_CHECKLIST.json').write_text(json.dumps(checklist, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# BEM-901 Pilot readiness scaffold\n\nStatus: PILOT_SCAFFOLD_READY\n\nThis prepares everything that can be prepared before the operator chooses the real pilot target.\n\nOperator gate remains only for real client/segment/objective/metric selection.\n'
Path('governance/pilot/PILOT_READINESS.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-901 pilot readiness validator
import json
from pathlib import Path
state = json.loads(Path("governance/state/pilot_readiness.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
errors = []
for name, folder in state.get("folders", {}).items():
    if not Path(folder).exists():
        errors.append(f"missing folder {name}: {folder}")
print("PASS" if not errors else "FAIL")
for err in errors:
    print(err)
raise SystemExit(0 if not errors else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/validate_pilot_readiness.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
errors = []
for p in pilot_scaffold['folders'].values():
    if not Path(p).exists():
        errors.append('missing ' + p)
status = 'PASS' if not errors else 'FAIL'
Path('governance/reports/BEM901_PILOT_READINESS.md').write_text('# BEM-901 Pilot readiness validation\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM901_PILOT_READINESS_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-901 pilot readiness proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nErrors: ' + (', '.join(errors) if errors else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/pilot_readiness.json','governance/pilot/PILOT_READINESS_CHECKLIST.json','governance/pilot/PILOT_READINESS.md','governance/tools/validate_pilot_readiness.py','governance/reports/BEM901_PILOT_READINESS.md',str(marker)])
ops_applied.append('BEM901 pilot readiness ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
